calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Michael Gipson

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted. No opposition filed. The October 24, 2016 trial date is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). The November 20, 2017 return holding date is vacated. The new return holding date is March 5, 2018 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is March 14, 2018. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the October 24, 2016 trial date, which has passed. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by February 26, 2018 at 2:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:30a.m. on March 1, 2018. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to CRC, Rule 3.1380 and San Francisco Local Rules of Court, Rules 5.0 and 20.2 on March 5, 2018 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rules 5.0 and 20.2 and provide a confidential settlement statement by March 1, 2018 at 2:00p.m.. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Matter not reported. (503/CML)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
